news.paragraph: Silver prices saw a slight uptick as market participants assessed the potential impact of a new Iran deal alongside ongoing inflation concerns. The commodity's movement reflects a cautious optimism, with traders monitoring geopolitical developments and macroeconomic indicators for further direction. The absence of a clear catalyst suggests price action may remain range-bound in the near term.

headlines.title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation

examples.body: Hang tight folks. When the peace deal is signed and oil, USD, and 10Y yield tank, that should rally spot silver to $90 - $100. $SI_F $SLV $AGQ $SIVR
Close like this could be big for silver, higher low, close above key volume level, room to run $SLV $XAGUSD
